suggestions.rationale: DevNet 0 was targeted for 'first day of Interop' (late April) in ACDC #177. With over two weeks elapsed, this is the critical path item for the Glamsterdam fork combining ePBS and BAL workstreams.

suggestions.topic: Partial slot proofs implementation status across all clients
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #173 established 'Cannot ship ePBS without partial slot proofs in all clients' as a hard requirement. No completion confirmation in subsequent meetings despite ePBS DevNet progression. This is a blocking dependency for mainnet.

suggestions.topic: PTC fix PRs 4992/5020 resolution and DevNet 1 implications
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #176 flagged PTC as forcing a DevNet 1 and 'only hard fork requirement' with Monday March 24 decision deadline. No explicit resolution found, though PR 5094 was mentioned as blocking in #177. Needs clarity on current state.

ACDC #177 opened the non-headliner proposal window with 'end date TBD based on Glamsterdam progress.' With DevNet 0 likely complete or near completion, closing this window is time-sensitive for Hegotá planning.

suggestions.topic: Native account abstraction roadmap review and next steps
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #177 scheduled a breakout for April 23. If the breakout occurred, teams should report findings and discuss whether any proposals are candidates for Hegotá or future forks.
Added as optional to Glamsterdam DevNet 0 in ACDC #177. With DevNet likely running, gather feedback on whether this should be promoted to required or remains optional for mainnet fork.

suggestions.topic: 4788 gaps for empty payloads: stakeholder feedback and mitigation
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #176 identified 4788 gaps under ePBS with action for stokes to contact Lido, Rocketpool, EigenLayer. No confirmation of outreach completion or findings reported.

suggestions.topic: Cell-level deltas metrics and deployment timeline
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #174 noted implementation progress across clients and backwards compatibility allowing pre-Amsterdam deployment. Metrics PR review was action-itemed but not confirmed complete. Update on readiness for mainnet rollout.
